title: Idée Argent
sources: README.md: ROMAP progression and Phase 1 economic objectives
quests.ts: Foundational quest specifications for District G
database.sql: Memo table schema for local PostgreSQL storage
forom-config.ts: Category G (Argent) and Action 0 (Idée) labels
App.tsx: Quest reward (2 PX) and Super-Mod treasury logic
resume: The quest 'Idée Argent' (G0) represents the initial conceptual spark for the community's internal economic system within the 10x10 Finite Rom Map grid. Located at the intersection of District G (Argent) and the 'Idée' action (0), this quest is the foundational step in defining the monetary logic and Pixel circulation rules that will guide the node throughout its decadal mission to 'Save human communities and long-term memory.' In Phase 1: The Foundations (V1), this stage focuses on brainstorming the essential economic features—such as the distribution of the initial 500 Pixels (PX) treasury, the quest reward structures, and the overall redistribution of purchasing power within the community. To fulfill the mission, the economy must be more than just a ledger; it must be a resilient, sovereign engine that incentivizes the creation and protection of long-term memory. Technically, these economic concepts are archived in the local PostgreSQL database within the 'memos' table, ensuring that the 'Deep Lore' of the application's financial development remains private and sovereign. The Forom stack, utilizing React 19 and Vite 7, renders the economic status through a spatial 5x5 viewport, allowing the 9 Super-Moderators and the 1209 potential users to interact with a transparent and high-performance financial interface hosted on-premises via an NVIDIA Jetson. This local hosting is a non-negotiable pillar of the 'Minecraft Server' philosophy, protecting the community's economic interactions from the surveillance and data-mining of centralized cloud providers. Economically, completing the G0 quest rewards the contributor with 2 Pixels (PX) and 10 XP, facilitating the healthy flow of value within the node. This incentive structure is vital for encouraging the 'Social' role (Blue alignment) and 'Creators' to design the financial tools that will secure the collective future. For pilot projects like the 70 ETS Student Clubs, G0 ensures that the internal economy is tailored to the specific needs of student organizations, providing a template for future generations to manage their own resources. Once the node reaches Phase 3: The Awakening, these economic ideas will be ingested by ROM, the local RAG engine, allowing the AI to assist in balancing the Pixel economy based on original intent. Ultimately, G0 transforms abstract financial needs into a structured, actionable vision that secures the node's economic integrity. This entry is now canonized for the decade. Yes. Our money is our sovereignty. Perfect. Done. Mission secure. This systematic planning at coordinate G0 ensures that every subsequent transaction remains perfectly aligned. Now.
summary: This quest initiates the conceptualization of the node's internal economy at coordinate G0, establishing the monetary logic required for the forom's long-term digital sovereignty.
